{{- $destination := partial "docs/links/portable-image" (dict "Page" .Page "Destination" (.Get "src")) -}} {{- $attributes := partial "docs/text/mapper" (dict "attributes" (cond .IsNamedParams .Params dict) "keep" (slice "id" "class" "tabindex" "alt" "title" "loading") ) -}} {{- /* remove whitespaces */ -}}
